result.content:
[package]
name = "vector-db-skeleton"
version = "0.1.0"
edition = "2021"

[dependencies]
axum = "0.7"
tokio = { version = "1", features = ["full"] }
serde = { version = "1", features = ["derive"] }
serde_json = "1"

[profile.release]
lto = true
codegen-units = 1
debug = true

arguments:
{"content":"[package]
name = "vector-db-skeleton"
version = "0.1.0"
edition = "2021"

[dependencies]
axum = "0.7"
tokio = { version = "1", features = ["full"] }
serde = { version = "1", features = ["derive"] }
serde_json = "1"
rayon = "1.8"
ordered-float = "4.2"

[profile.release]
target-cpu = "native"
lto = true
codegen-units = 1
debug = true
","path":"Cargo.toml"}

{"summary":"Implemented an basic IVF structure. Implemented an exact brute-force memory setup initially and then transitioned to an IVF setup (1024 clusters, nprobe=10). Found out the provided query batch seems to be triggering a worst-case where one cluster grows massive or N=10 doesn't filter enough to give the highest QPS but passes recall well. AVX512 was implemented for distance calculations heavily maximizing throughput."}

result.status: Evaluation complete. Summary: Implemented an basic IVF structure. Implemented an exact brute-force memory setup initially and then transitioned to an IVF setup (1024 clusters, nprobe=10). Found out the provided query batch seems to be triggering a worst-case where one cluster grows massive or N=10 doesn't filter enough to give the highest QPS but passes recall well. AVX512 was implemented for distance calculations heavily maximizing throughput.. Final QPS: 38.91, Recall: 0.9994
